display.purpose: Newsletter masthead H1 and the 'The Alpha Feed' feed masthead. Fraunces 30px, opsz 64. Largest type.

title.purpose: Insight card + newsletter item titles. Fraunces 20px, opsz 34.

body.purpose: Card summaries and UI prose. Inter 14px, muted, <=68ch.

data.purpose: Scores, dates, sources, counts, category tags. Tabular mono 11px; the score number is the loudest data — mono 700 at 1.6rem/26px with a 9px '/ 10' denominator.

label.purpose: Kickers, section labels, filter micro-labels. Inter uppercase, tracked.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Inputs, pagination, brand tile — a hairline of lift.

shadows.name: shadow-md
shadows.purpose: Insight cards and the reading surface at rest.

shadows.name: shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Card hover and popovers, paired with a 2px upward translate.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Card entrance and hover lift; the system's signature easing.

motion.name: transition-state
motion.purpose: Color/border state changes on buttons, pills, nav, inputs.

motion.name: rise
motion.value: @keyframes rise { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(6px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: none; } }
motion.purpose: Staggered card entrance, 0.4s, delay = min(index,12)*28ms per card.

components.name: Insight Card
components.description: The signature feed unit: a 56px score chip (score is the product — number in mono 700 at 1.6rem; fill scales with score so 9-10 wears the strongest tint) beside metadata, a 20px serif linked title, summary, and impact line. Lifts on hover.
components.html:
9/ 10
Applied MLGitHub· Jul 12, 2026

Transformer-based limit-order-book forecasting beats GRU baselines

A reproducible study fine-tuning a compact attention model on level-2 book snapshots, with open weights and a backtest harness.

Why it mattersDrop-in signal for microstructure desks; the harness makes live A/B feasible within a day.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--color-surface, #fff); border: 1px solid var(--color-border, oklch(0.9 0.008 70)); border-radius: 14px; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 2px 4px oklch(0.26 0.012 60 / 0.05), 0 6px 16px oklch(0.26 0.012 60 / 0.07); transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), border-color 200ms; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: var(--color-border-strong, oklch(0.83 0.01 70)); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px oklch(0.26 0.012 60 / 0.1), 0 3px 8px oklch(0.26 0.012 60 / 0.06); } .ds-card-row { display: flex; gap: 16px; } .ds-score { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 56px; width: 56px; flex-shrink: 0; border-radius: 10px; font-family: ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; line-height: 1; color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-accent, oklch(0.64 0.17 35)) 72%, var(--color-ink, oklch(0.26 0.012 60))); background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-accent, oklch(0.64 0.17 35)) 22%, var(--color-surface, #fff)); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-accent, oklch(0.64 0.17 35)) 52%, transparent); } .ds-score-n { font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-score-d { font-size: 9px; color: var(--color-faint, oklch(0.52 0.012 60)); } .ds-card-body { min-width: 0; flex: 1; } .ds-meta { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: 6px 12px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-chip { font-family: ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 10px; color: var(--color-cat-ml, oklch(0.52 0.1 235)); background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-cat-ml, oklch(0.52 0.1 235)) 13%, var(--color-surface, #fff)); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-cat-ml, oklch(0.52 0.1 235)) 36%, transparent); } .ds-src { font-family: ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: var(--color-faint, oklch(0.52 0.012 60)); } .ds-title { font-family: 'Fraunces Variable', Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-variation-settings: 'opsz' 34; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.35; margin: 0; overflow-wrap: anywhere; color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.26 0.012 60)); } .ds-title a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; text-underline-offset: 4px; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-title a:hover { color: var(--color-accent-dim, oklch(0.5 0.15 34)); text-decoration: underline; } .ds-summary { margin: 8px 0 0; max-width: 68ch; font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--color-muted, oklch(0.44 0.012 60)); } .ds-impact { margin: 12px 0 0; max-width: 68ch; font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--color-muted, oklch(0.44 0.012 60)); } .ds-kicker { margin-right: 6px; font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--color-accent-dim, oklch(0.5 0.15 34)); }

components.name: Filter Pill
components.description: Toggleable filter chip. White ghost when unselected; tint fill + deep-hue text when selected.
components.css: .ds-pill { border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, oklch(0.9 0.008 70)); padding: 4px 12px; font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-muted, oklch(0.44 0.012 60)); background: var(--color-surface, #fff); cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms, background 150ms, border-color 150ms; } .ds-pill:hover { border-color: var(--color-border-strong, oklch(0.83 0.01 70)); } .ds-pill-selected { color: var(--color-accent-dim, oklch(0.5 0.15 34)); background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-accent-dim, oklch(0.5 0.15 34)) 12%, var(--color-surface, #fff)); border-color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-accent-dim, oklch(0.5 0.15 34)) 40%, transparent); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Debounced search field with inline magnifier; soft shadow, border shifts to deep coral on focus.
components.css: .ds-search-wrap { position: relative; } .ds-search-icon { position: absolute; left: 12px; top: 50%; height: 16px; width: 16px; transform: translateY(-50%); color: var(--color-faint, oklch(0.52 0.012 60)); pointer-events: none; } .ds-search { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, oklch(0.9 0.008 70)); background: var(--color-surface, #fff); padding: 8px 12px 8px 36px; font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.26 0.012 60)); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0.26 0.012 60 / 0.05); outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms; } .ds-search::placeholder { color: var(--color-faint, oklch(0.52 0.012 60)); } .ds-search:focus { border-color: var(--color-accent-dim, oklch(0.5 0.15 34)); }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Inter sentence-case nav link; coral-tint pill when active.
components.html: FeedCommunityNewsletter
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-item { border-radius: 10px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-muted, oklch(0.44 0.012 60)); text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms, background 150ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.26 0.012 60)); } .ds-nav-active { background: var(--color-accent-tint, oklch(0.93 0.03 40)); color: var(--color-accent-dim, oklch(0.5 0.15 34)); }

components.name: Brand Mark
components.description: The alpha tile + serif wordmark. Coral tile with warm-white glyph.
components.css: .ds-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-brand-tile { display: grid; place-items: center; height: 40px; width: 40px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Fraunces Variable', Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-accent-ink, oklch(0.99 0.005 70)); background: var(--color-accent, oklch(0.64 0.17 35)); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0.26 0.012 60 / 0.05); } .ds-brand-word { font-family: 'Fraunces Variable', Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-variation-settings: 'opsz' 36; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.26 0.012 60)); white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Segmented Control
components.description: A grouped toggle for a small set of mutually-exclusive options (sort Top/Newest, minimum score, timeframe presets). Hairline-bordered container on shadow-sm; the active segment is a coral-tint inset pill (accent-tint fill + accent-dim text), inactive segments are muted → ink on hover. Unifies the filter vocabulary and replaces native <select>.
components.css: .ds-seg { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, oklch(0.9 0.008 70)); background: var(--color-surface, #fff); padding: 2px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0.26 0.012 60 / 0.05); } .ds-seg-b { border: 0; background: none; border-radius: 7px; padding: 4px 10px; font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: var(--color-muted, oklch(0.44 0.012 60)); cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms, background 150ms; } .ds-seg-b:hover { color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.26 0.012 60)); } .ds-seg-on, .ds-seg-on:hover { background: var(--color-accent-tint, oklch(0.93 0.03 40)); color: var(--color-accent-dim, oklch(0.5 0.15 34)); }

components.name: Filters Popover
components.description: Progressive-disclosure filter panel: a 'Filters' button (with an accent-tint count badge for active secondary filters) opens a white card of secondary controls (score segmented, source pills, timeframe segmented). Portaled to <body> so the sticky bar's backdrop-blur can't clip it; anchored below-right of the trigger, viewport-clamped, shadow-lg, lg radius. Esc / outside-click dismiss, focus returns to the trigger; rise entrance (disabled under prefers-reduced-motion).
components.css: .ds-filt { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, oklch(0.9 0.008 70)); background: var(--color-surface, #fff); padding: 10px 12px; font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-muted, oklch(0.44 0.012 60)); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0.26 0.012 60 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; } .ds-filt:hover { color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.26 0.012 60)); border-color: var(--color-border-strong, oklch(0.83 0.01 70)); } .ds-filt-badge { display: grid; place-items: center; height: 16px; min-width: 16px; padding: 0 4px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--color-accent-tint, oklch(0.93 0.03 40)); font-family: ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: var(--color-accent-dim, oklch(0.5 0.15 34)); }

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Dashed-border teaching state; serif title, mono hint (often a CLI command).
components.html:
No insights match

Run the pipeline to populate the feed.
components.css: .ds-empty { border-radius: 14px; border: 1px dashed var(--color-border-strong, oklch(0.83 0.01 70)); background: var(--color-surface, #fff); padding: 64px 24px; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0.26 0.012 60 / 0.05); } .ds-empty-title { margin: 0; font-family: 'Fraunces Variable', Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-variation-settings: 'opsz' 32; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.26 0.012 60)); } .ds-empty-body { margin: 6px 0 0; font-family: ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 12px; color: var(--color-faint, oklch(0.52 0.012 60)); }

narrative.overview: Trading Alpha Engine is the calm, premium thing you open with your morning coffee — a well-made daily broadsheet on how AI and ML are reshaping the trading process, not a blinking terminal. Barely-warm off-white paper, pure-white cards that lift on soft warm shadows, one friendly poppy-coral accent that marks what's live, and a Fraunces-serif / Inter-sans pairing. Warmth is earned by the accent, the serif, and the shadows — never by tinting the body background toward cream, which is the saturated AI-generated default this redesign exists to escape.
keyCharacteristics: Barely-warm off-white paper (bg, OKLCH L0.985 C0.006); pure-white cards above it.
Depth from soft warm shadows, not borders-as-decoration or flat tonal steps.
One poppy-coral accent, used sparingly — active nav, links, high scores, the brand mark.
Fraunces serif for display + reading; Inter for UI; tabular mono for data.
A four-hue category index (agentic / ML / risk / infra), muted for a light surface.
Fixed rem type scale (no clamp()); comfortable reading measures (<=68-70ch).

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Coral appears on <=10% of any screen — brand mark, current selection, links, high scores. Use Deep Coral (accent-dim) for anything that is text on white. Its rarity is what makes a live signal read as live.

rules.name: The Earned-Warmth Rule
rules.body: Warmth comes from the accent, the serif, and the shadows — never from tinting the body toward cream. The paper stays at chroma ~0.006. If the background reads as beige/sand/parchment, the chroma is too high.

rules.name: The Two-Reds Rule
rules.body: The Deep Berry risk hue and the Poppy Coral accent must stay visibly distinct — berry is darker and cooler (hue 8 vs 35). Never let a risk chip drift toward the accent's brightness.

rules.name: The Read-in-Serif Rule
rules.body: Long-form newsletter prose is set in Fraunces at 17px/1.7 — it is meant to be read. UI micro-copy and card summaries stay in Inter; don't set working UI in the serif.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: No clamp(), no fluid headings. Sizes are a fixed rem ramp so a title in a narrow card and one in a wide column read at the same weight.

rules.name: The Warm-Shadow Rule
rules.body: All shadows are tinted with the ink hue (oklch(0.26 0.012 60)) at low alpha, never neutral black. A cool/black shadow on warm paper looks like dirt; the warm tint reads as light.

rules.name: The Lift-on-Intent Rule
rules.body: Cards rest on shadow-md; hover raises to shadow-lg plus a 2px upward translate. Motion is on shadow and transform only — never on layout.

dos: Do keep the body background a true low-chroma off-white and carry warmth through the coral accent, the Fraunces serif, and warm shadows.
Do keep coral under the 10%-of-screen ceiling; use Deep Coral (accent-dim) for anything that is text on white.
Do set long-form newsletter reading in Fraunces (17px/1.7, <=68ch) and working UI / card summaries in Inter; keep data in tabular mono.
Do build depth with the soft warm shadow scale, lifting cards on hover with shadow-lg + a 2px translate.
Do tint category chips as a light fill of their hue over white with the hue as text; keep each hue mapped to one category everywhere.
Do keep muted/faint text dark enough to pass AA (muted >=7:1, faint >=5:1 on white).
donts: Don't tint the body background toward cream / beige / sand / parchment — that warm-neutral band is the saturated AI-generated default of 2026 this redesign exists to escape.
Don't use neutral-gray or black shadows on the warm paper — they read as grime; tint with the ink hue at low alpha.
Don't let the Deep Berry risk hue and the Poppy Coral accent read as the same red.
Don't set working UI, nav, labels, or data in the serif — Fraunces is for display and long-form reading only.
Don't use gradient text, gradient hero metrics, or a big-number/small-label SaaS metric template.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively, or tiny tracked uppercase eyebrows above every section.
Don't use border-left/border-right colored stripes as accents; use full borders, tint fills, or the score chip.
Don't revert to the dark charcoal + neon-green terminal, or reintroduce a dark theme without an explicit toggled opt-in.
